typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	WildPath as string,
	FileName as string
}
source(output(
		trans_date as string,
		trans_type as string,
		fab_code as string,
		contract as string,
		contract_title as string,
		job as string,
		job_title as string,
		item as string,
		item_title as string,
		ndt_drawing as string,
		ndt_drawing_desc as string,
		wctrl as string,
		weld_suffix as string,
		stress_relief as string,
		weld_repair_ref as string,
		discipline as string,
		weld as string,
		activity_type as string,
		report_type as string,
		report_num as string,
		inspector as string,
		remarks as string,
		activity_done_by as string,
		activity_done_on as string,
		action_taken as string,
		action_taken_on as string,
		other_remarks as string,
		include_in_rr_calc as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'File_Path',
	multiLineRow: true,
	wildcardPaths:[($WildPath+'/'+$FileName+'_*_*.csv')]) ~> PCMStage
PCMStage derive(File_Path = concat(concat(trim(substringIndex(File_Path,'/',5),'/'),'/'),substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',substringIndex(split(substringIndex(File_Path,'/',-1),'.')[1],'_',3),'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv'),
		trans_date = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(trans_date,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		trans_type = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(trans_type,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		fab_code = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(fab_code,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		contract = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(contract,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		contract_title = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(contract_title,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		job = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(job,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		job_title = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(job_title,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		item = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		item_title = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item_title,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		ndt_drawing = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(ndt_drawing,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		ndt_drawing_desc = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(ndt_drawing_desc,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		discipline = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(discipline,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		inspector = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(inspector,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' ')),
		include_in_rr_calc = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(include_in_rr_calc,'\n',' '),'\r',' '),'\r\n',' '),',',' '),'"',' '),'\\',' '),'  ',' '))) ~> SetFileName
SetFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'File_Path',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> PCMRaw
